# Smile Avenue Family Dentistry

> Hospitality-driven family dental practice with two locations in Cypress and Katy, TX. 5,000+ five-star Google reviews. Same-day appointments available.

## Business Information
- Name: Smile Avenue Family Dentistry
- Type: Dental Practice (General, Cosmetic, Implant, Pediatric, Emergency)
- Founded by: Dr. Patrick Vuong, DMD
- Locations: Cypress, TX and Katy, TX
- Phone (Cypress): (832) 648-1756
- Phone (Katy): (281) 800-5008
- Website: https://www.smileavenuefamilydentistry.com
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Rating: 4.9 stars from 5,000+ verified Google reviews
- Insurance: Most PPO plans accepted
- Financing: 0% financing through CareCredit and Sunbit
- In-House Lab: Smile Dental Lab for same-day crowns, veneers, and implant restorations

## Locations

### Cypress Office
- Address: 9212 Fry Rd #120, Cypress, TX 77433
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8:30am–5pm
- Phone: (832) 648-1756
- Book Online: https://book.modento.io/c/8e39e583fb6841bb833642fb994d478c/SmileAvenueCypress
- Doctors: Dr. Patrick Vuong (DMD, Founder), Dr. Peter Kim (DDS, Implants & Oral Surgery), Dr. Laith Yahya (DDS, Oral Surgery & Implants), Dr. Sarah Maredia (DDS, Restorative), Dr. Shayan Alkhiro (DDS, General)
- Communities Served: Cypress, Bridgeland, Fairfield, Towne Lake, Cy-Fair, Jersey Village, Spring, Tomball, Hockley

### Katy Office
- Address: 23541 Westheimer Pkwy Ste #170, Katy, TX 77494
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8:30am–5pm, Sat 8am–2pm
- Phone: (281) 800-5008
- Book Online: https://book.modento.io/c/7e879f019b1846dda0dde08e10b56c25/SmileAvenueKaty
- Doctors: Dr. Patrick Vuong (DMD, Founder), Dr. Sameer Bilal (DDS, Implants & Restorative), Dr. Sarah Maredia (DDS, Restorative)
- Communities Served: Katy, Cinco Ranch, Firethorne, Cross Creek Ranch, Fulshear, Elyson, Brookshire, Richmond, Westheimer Parkway

## Services Offered
- Dental Implants (Single, All-on-4, All-on-6)
- Cosmetic Dentistry (Veneers, Bonding, Smile Makeovers)
- Invisalign Clear Aligners
- Emergency Dentistry (Same-Day Appointments)
- Teeth Whitening (In-Office & Take-Home)
- Dental Crowns & Bridges
- Root Canal Therapy
- Oral Surgery & Tooth Extraction
- Sedation Dentistry (Nitrous, Oral, IV)
- Pediatric Dentistry
- Preventive Dentistry & Cleanings
- Dentures (Traditional & Implant-Supported)
- Porcelain Veneers (Emax & Zirconia)
- Family Dental Care

## Key Differentiators
- In-house Smile Dental Lab for same-day crowns and precise restorations
- Netflix in every treatment room, warm blankets, spa-like environment
- 5,000+ five-star reviews across Google, Yelp, and Facebook
- Most major PPO insurance plans accepted
- 0% financing available through CareCredit and Sunbit
- Bilingual staff (English & Spanish)
- Digital scanners (Medit/Imetric) — no goopy impressions
- 3D CBCT imaging for precise implant placement
- IV sedation available in-house — no referrals needed
- Same-day emergency appointments available
